title: Seeing smoke from 1904 fire on Potlatch Ridge; fireproofing main street buildings.
description: Saw smoke from 1904 Kendrick fire up on Potlatch Ridge. Ordinance passed that all buildings on Main Street had to be fireproofed. Cause of fire unknown.
